channel.title: Neovim on LinuxRepos
channel.description: Recent content in Neovim on LinuxRepos

item.title: Neovim Is Better
item.description: I’ve never experienced a program with such power and potential than Neovim. It does so much and we are at the beginning as it isn’t even to a 1.0 release yet. The best part is the program works on Windows, MacOS, and Linux.
